hooks.command: cmd=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; { cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; } >&2 || { echo "Blocked: cargo fmt --check or clippy failed; fix before committing." >&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: Pre-commit gate: cargo +nightly fmt --check && cargo clippy
